golf/pga.progress: competitor.status.thru (holes done) + status.period (round). Score is to-par string ('-10'/'E'/'+3'); strokes total is derived by summing completed-round linescore values (normalize.js).
golf/pga.playoffDetect: competition.status.hadPlayoff === true (the reliable signal) AND/OR competitor.status.playoff AND/OR a linescore period>numberOfRounds. QUIRK: SITE tournament.playoffType is HALLUCINATED; the CORE event carries playoffType {id:-1,'None'} but hadPlayoff stays the signal.
golf/pga.nonFinishers: VERIFIED 2026-07: NO per-player MC/WD/DQ label survives on any live endpoint — competitor.status is absent on the site scoreboard (cut players are simply REMOVED from later-round payloads: 144 competitors during R1-2, 72 after the cut) and the leaderboard endpoints 404. Render the cut LINE from meta.golf instead; do not hunt for status labels.
golf/pga.meta: meta.golf {numberOfRounds,currentRound,cutRound,cutScore,cutCount,major,scoringSystem} — VERIFIED 2026-07 from CORE event -> tournament.$ref -> tournaments/{id}/seasons/{yyyy}. NOT on the site scoreboard. The worker's scores route enriches golf events with 2 extra fetches each (best-effort; omitted on failure). Rewrite $ref '.pvt' hosts to '.com'.
golf/pga.scorecard: hole-by-hole per player: site.web.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/golf/{tour}/leaderboard/{eventId}/playersummary?season={yyyy}&player={id} (VERIFIED 2026-07: per-hole value+par+scoreType.name, inScore/outScore, teeTime/startTee/groupNumber pre-round, profile+stats). Served as /v1/scorecard/{sport}/{league}/{eventId}/{playerId}. Golf seasons are calendar-aligned so a getFullYear() season fallback is safe HERE (unlike standings).
notes: cut presence varies BY EVENT not league — read cutRound off the core tournament resource (0 = no cut)
ignore trailing sentinel linescore periods (e.g. 402) with only {period}
scoreboard per-hole linescores exist but carry only value+scoreType.displayValue (no par, no named scoreType) — the playersummary is the scorecard source

racing/f1.result: no score field. Finish = competitor.order; grid = competitor.startOrder; period = laps completed by leader. championship pts + lap stats in core statistics.
racing/f1.dnf: DNF/unclassified = competitor has NO `order` (and a SPARSE statistics set — keys like lapsCompleted/place are ABSENT, not zero). Never test lapsCompleted==0; key off absence of order. Vehicle object still present.
racing/f1.multiCompetition: F1 event = MANY competitions (FP1/FP2/FP3 share type.id=1, differ by abbreviation; Qualifying; Race; Sprint weekends add 2 more). NASCAR/IndyCar = ONE competition (id==eventId). Filter F1 to type.abbreviation=='Race' for the race.

golf/ntw.nonFinishers: VERIFIED 2026-07: NO per-player MC/WD/DQ label survives on any live endpoint — competitor.status is absent on the site scoreboard (cut players are simply REMOVED from later-round payloads: 144 competitors during R1-2, 72 after the cut) and the leaderboard endpoints 404. Render the cut LINE from meta.golf instead; do not hunt for status labels.
golf/ntw.meta: meta.golf {numberOfRounds,currentRound,cutRound,cutScore,cutCount,major,scoringSystem} — VERIFIED 2026-07 from CORE event -> tournament.$ref -> tournaments/{id}/seasons/{yyyy}. NOT on the site scoreboard. The worker's scores route enriches golf events with 2 extra fetches each (best-effort; omitted on failure). Rewrite $ref '.pvt' hosts to '.com'.
golf/ntw.scorecard: hole-by-hole per player: site.web.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/golf/{tour}/leaderboard/{eventId}/playersummary?season={yyyy}&player={id} (VERIFIED 2026-07: per-hole value+par+scoreType.name, inScore/outScore, teeTime/startTee/groupNumber pre-round, profile+stats). Served as /v1/scorecard/{sport}/{league}/{eventId}/{playerId}. Golf seasons are calendar-aligned so a getFullYear() season fallback is safe HERE (unlike standings).

australian-football/afl.score: competitor.score is TOTAL points as a string (goals*6 + behinds), e.g. '120'. The goals.behinds breakdown (e.g. '19.6.120') is NOT a discrete competitor field on the cheap scoreboard; it is derivable only from per-player leaders.goals — surface total points as the canonical score.
australian-football/afl.linescores: competitor.linescores present and verified = per-quarter points, NON-cumulative (sum the quarters to get the total; do NOT treat as cumulative like rugby).
australian-football/afl.clock: counts UP; ~20-min quarters plus time-on, so displayClock can exceed 20:00 (verified 29:27 in Q4). format.regulation.periods=4.
australian-football/afl.standings: AFL ladder is ordered by Premiership Points (points: 4/win, 2/draw, 0/loss) THEN Percentage (pointsFor/pointsAgainst*100) — NOT point differential. pointDifferential exists in the feed but is not the tiebreaker.
